title: Project scaffolding: directory structure, pyproject.toml, config module
shared_contracts: Settings dataclass with: x_bearer_token, google_api_key, google_cx, proxy_url (default http://127.0.0.1:7897), search_priority (default [x, google, douyin, baidu])
acceptance: Settings loads from env vars with sensible defaults
verification: pip install -e . && python -c "from web_prime_search.config import Settings; print(Settings())"
